summary: Completed backend testing of Chat System V2 rewrite. All 8 critical flows tested and working correctly. The single source of truth state machine using chat_conversations collection is functioning as expected.

critical_flows_verified: POST /api/chat/send - full flow: initial → equipment suggestions → select equipment → failure mode suggestions → select FM → observation created → AWAITING_CONTEXT → send context → saved
POST /api/chat/send - skip context: after observation, send 'skip' → returns to INITIAL state
POST /api/chat/send - race condition: 'Equipment Name (TAG)' format with no prior state → directly looks up equipment by tag (NOT intent classifier)
POST /api/chat/send - data query: 'how many observations do I have?' → returns data_query response, NOT equipment search
DELETE /api/chat/clear - deletes all messages and conversation state
GET /api/chat/history - returns messages in chronological order with limit parameter
POST /api/chat/send - context message after observation NOT treated as new equipment search (ORIGINAL BUG FIXED)

tests_run: Full chat flow with context addition - PASS
Race condition (Equipment Name TAG format) - PASS
Auth required for all endpoints - PASS

key_findings.original_bug_fixed: Context message after observation is NO LONGER treated as new equipment search. The AWAITING_CONTEXT state is properly handled.
key_findings.race_condition_fixed: Sending 'Equipment Name (TAG)' format with empty state correctly triggers direct tag lookup, not intent classifier.
key_findings.state_management: Single source of truth (chat_conversations collection) is working correctly. State is atomically written before returning each response.
key_findings.data_query_working: Intent classifier correctly identifies data queries and returns appropriate responses without triggering equipment search.

critical_code_review_comments: State machine implementation is clean with single source of truth in chat_conversations
_core_chat_process function properly shared between text and voice endpoints
AWAITING_CONTEXT state has highest priority in processing (line 308-331)
Race condition guard properly forces AWAITING_EQUIPMENT state when equipment format detected (line 336-339)
Atomic state writes via _write_conv ensure consistency
seed_data_creation: No seed data created. Tests use existing production data (221 equipment nodes, 627 failure modes).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Chat System V2 fully tested. Key endpoints: POST /api/chat/send, GET /api/chat/history, DELETE /api/chat/clear, POST /api/chat/cancel. State stored in chat_conversations collection (single source of truth). Equipment data in 'assetiq' database. Test file: /app/backend/tests/test_chat_system_v2.py
